patthana14.19:1.1.pli: Saññojanaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nosaññojano dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …pe… ganthaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nogantho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …pe… oghaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca noogho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …pe… yogaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca noyogo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …pe… nīvaraṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nonīvaraṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana14.19:2.1.pli: Hetuyā nava …pe… vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate nava.

patthana14.2:1.1.pli: Sahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Sahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Sahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasahetuko ca naahetuko ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana14.2:2.1.pli: Ahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Ahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Ahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasahetuko ca naahetuko ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana14.2:3.1.pli: Sahetukañca ahetukañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nasahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Sahetukañca ahetukañca dhammaṁ paṭicca naahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Sahetukañca ahetukañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nasahetuko ca naahetuko ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana14.2:4.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe cha, adhipatiyā pañca …pe… avigate nava. (Sahajātavārampi …pe… pañhāvārampi vitthāretabbaṁ.)

patthana14.20:2.1.pli: Hetuyā pañca …pe… vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate pañca. (Āsavagocchakasadisaṁ.)

patthana14.21:2.1.pli: Anārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naanārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana14.21:3.1.pli: Sārammaṇañca anārammaṇañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nasārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana14.21:4.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe tīṇi, adhipatiyā pañca …pe… aññamaññe cha …pe… purejāte āsevane ekaṁ …pe… avigate nava. (Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana14.22:1.1.pli: Cittaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nocitto dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … ekaṁ.

patthana14.22:2.1.pli: Nocittaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nanocitto dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana14.22:3.1.pli: Cittañca nocittañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nocitto dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (1) (Saṅkhittaṁ. Sabbattha pañca.)

patthana14.23:1.1.pli: Cetasikaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nacetasiko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Hetuyā nava …pe… purejāte āsevane pañca …pe… avigate nava.

patthana14.23:2.1.pli: Cittasampayuttaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nacittasampayutto dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …pe….

patthana14.23:3.1.pli: Cittasaṁsaṭṭhaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nacittasaṁsaṭṭho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana14.23:5.1.pli: Cittasamuṭṭhānaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nacittasamuṭṭhāno dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana14.23:6.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe nava, adhipatiyā pañca …pe… purejāte āsevane pañca …pe… avigate nava.

patthana14.23:7.1.pli: Cittasahabhuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nacittasahabhū dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …pe… cittānuparivattiṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nacittānuparivattī dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …pe… cittasaṁsaṭṭhasamuṭṭhānaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nacittasaṁsaṭṭhasamuṭṭhāno dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …pe… cittasaṁsaṭṭhasamuṭṭhānasahabhuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nacittasaṁsaṭṭhasamuṭṭhānasahabhū dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …pe… cittasaṁsaṭṭhasamuṭṭhānānuparivattiṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nacittasaṁsaṭṭhasamuṭṭhānānuparivattī dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana14.23:8.1.pli: Hetuyā nava …pe… purejāte āsevane pañca …pe… avigate nava.

patthana14.23:9.1.pli: Ajjhattikaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naajjhattiko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana14.23:10.1.pli: Bāhiraṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nabāhiro dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana14.23:11.1.pli: Ajjhattikañca bāhirañca dhammaṁ paṭicca naajjhattiko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana14.23:14.1.pli: Noupādā dhammaṁ paṭicca nanoupādā dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana14.23:15.1.pli: Upādā ca noupādā ca dhammaṁ paṭicca noupādā dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana14.23:16.1.pli: Hetuyā pañca, ārammaṇe tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… purejāte āsevane ekaṁ …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana14.23:17.1.pli: Upādinnaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naupādinno dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana14.23:18.1.pli: Anupādinnaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naanupādinno dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana14.23:19.1.pli: Upādinnañca anupādinnañca dhammaṁ paṭicca naupādinno dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana14.23:20.1.pli: Hetuyā pañca, ārammaṇe dve, adhipatiyā ekaṁ …pe… āsevane ekaṁ …pe… avigate pañca. (Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana14.24:2.1.pli: Hetuyā nava …pe… vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate nava.

patthana14.25:2.1.pli: Hetuyā nava …pe… vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate nava.

patthana14.26:1.1.pli: Dassanena pahātabbaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nadassanena pahātabbo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Dassanena pahātabbaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nanadassanena pahātabbo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Dassanena pahātabbaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nadassanena pahātabbo ca nanadassanena pahātabbo ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana14.26:2.1.pli: Nadassanena pahātabbaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nadassanena pahātabbo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana14.26:3.1.pli: Dassanena pahātabbañca nadassanena pahātabbañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nadassanena pahātabbo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana14.26:4.1.pli: Hetuyā pañca, ārammaṇe dve …pe… vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana14.27:1.1.pli: Bhāvanāya pahātabbaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nabhāvanāya pahātabbo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Bhāvanāya pahātabbaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nanabhāvanāya pahātabbo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Bhāvanāya pahātabbaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nabhāvanāya pahātabbo ca nanabhāvanāya pahātabbo ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana14.27:2.1.pli: Nabhāvanāya pahātabbaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nabhāvanāya pahātabbo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana14.27:3.1.pli: Bhāvanāya pahātabbañca nabhāvanāya pahātabbañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nabhāvanāya pahātabbo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana14.27:4.1.pli: Hetuyā pañca, ārammaṇe dve …pe… vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana14.28:1.1.pli: Dassanena pahātabbahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nadassanena pahātabbahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Dassanena pahātabbahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nanadassanena pahātabbahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana14.28:2.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe cha, adhipatiyā pañca …pe… vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate nava.

patthana14.29:1.1.pli: Bhāvanāya pahātabbahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nabhāvanāya pahātabbahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Bhāvanāya pahātabbahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nanabhāvanāya pahātabbahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana14.29:2.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe cha, adhipatiyā pañca …pe… vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate nava.

patthana14.3:1.1.pli: Hetusampayuttaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetusampayutto dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Hetusampayuttaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetuvippayutto dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Hetusampayuttaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetusampayutto ca nahetuvippayutto ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana14.3:2.1.pli: Hetuvippayuttaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetuvippayutto dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Hetuvippayuttaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetusampayutto dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Hetuvippayuttaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetusampayutto ca nahetuvippayutto ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana14.3:3.1.pli: Hetusampayuttañca hetuvippayuttañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetusampayutto dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Hetusampayuttañca hetuvippayuttañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetuvippayutto dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Hetusampayuttañca hetuvippayuttañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetusampayutto ca nahetuvippayutto ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana14.3:4.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe cha, adhipatiyā pañca …pe… avigate nava. (Sahajātavārampi …pe… pañhāvārampi vitthāretabbaṁ.)

patthana14.30:2.1.pli: Avitakkaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naavitakko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana14.30:3.1.pli: Hetuyā nava …pe… purejāte āsevane cha …pe… avigate nava.

patthana14.30:4.1.pli: Savicāraṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasavicāro dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana14.30:5.1.pli: Avicāraṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naavicāro dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana14.30:6.1.pli: Hetuyā nava …pe… purejāte āsevane cha …pe… avigate nava.

patthana14.31:1.1.pli: Sappītikaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasappītiko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana14.31:2.1.pli: Appītikaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naappītiko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana14.31:3.1.pli: Hetuyā nava …pe… purejāte āsevane cha …pe… avigate nava.

patthana14.31:4.1.pli: Pītisahagataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca napītisahagato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana14.31:5.1.pli: Napītisahagataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nanapītisahagato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana14.31:6.1.pli: Hetuyā nava …pe… purejāte āsevane cha …pe… avigate nava.

patthana14.31:7.1.pli: Sukhasahagataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasukhasahagato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana14.31:8.1.pli: Nasukhasahagataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nanasukhasahagato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana14.31:9.1.pli: Hetuyā nava …pe… purejāte āsevane cha …pe… avigate nava.

patthana14.31:10.1.pli: Upekkhāsahagataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naupekkhāsahagato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana14.31:11.1.pli: Naupekkhāsahagataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nanaupekkhāsahagato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana14.31:12.1.pli: Hetuyā nava …pe… purejāte āsevane cha …pe… avigate nava.

patthana14.32:1.1.pli: Kāmāvacaraṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nakāmāvacaro dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana14.32:2.1.pli: Nakāmāvacaraṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nanakāmāvacaro dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana14.32:3.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe cattāri, adhipatiyā pañca …pe… aññamaññe cha …pe… purejāte āsevane dve …pe… avigate nava.

patthana14.32:4.1.pli: Rūpāvacaraṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca narūpāvacaro dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana14.32:5.1.pli: Narūpāvacaraṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nanarūpāvacaro dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana14.32:6.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe cattāri, adhipatiyā pañca …pe… aññamaññe cha …pe… purejāte āsevane dve …pe… avigate nava.

patthana14.32:7.1.pli: Arūpāvacaraṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naarūpāvacaro dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana14.32:8.1.pli: Naarūpāvacaraṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nanaarūpāvacaro dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana14.32:9.1.pli: Arūpāvacarañca naarūpāvacarañca dhammaṁ paṭicca naarūpāvacaro dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana14.32:10.1.pli: Hetuyā pañca, ārammaṇe dve …pe… vipāke dve …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana14.33:1.1.pli: Pariyāpannaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naapariyāpanno dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana14.33:2.1.pli: Apariyāpannaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naapariyāpanno dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Apariyāpannaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca napariyāpanno dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Apariyāpannaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca napariyāpanno ca naapariyāpanno ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana14.33:3.1.pli: Pariyāpannañca apariyāpannañca dhammaṁ paṭicca naapariyāpanno dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana14.33:4.1.pli: Hetuyā pañca, ārammaṇe dve …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana14.34:1.1.pli: Niyyānikaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naniyyāniko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana14.34:2.1.pli: Aniyyānikaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naniyyāniko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana14.34:3.1.pli: Niyyānikañca aniyyānikañca dhammaṁ paṭicca naniyyāniko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana14.34:4.1.pli: Hetuyā pañca, ārammaṇe dve …pe… vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana14.35:1.1.pli: Niyataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naniyato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana14.35:2.1.pli: Aniyataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naniyato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana14.35:3.1.pli: Niyatañca aniyatañca dhammaṁ paṭicca naniyato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana14.35:4.1.pli: Hetuyā pañca, ārammaṇe dve …pe… vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana14.36:1.1.pli: Sauttaraṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naanuttaro dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana14.36:2.1.pli: Anuttaraṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naanuttaro dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Anuttaraṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasauttaro dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Anuttaraṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasauttaro ca naanuttaro ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana14.36:3.1.pli: Sauttarañca anuttarañca dhammaṁ paṭicca naanuttaro dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana14.36:4.1.pli: Hetuyā pañca, ārammaṇe dve …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana14.37:1.1.pli: Saraṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasaraṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Saraṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naaraṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Saraṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasaraṇo ca naaraṇo ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana14.37:2.1.pli: Araṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naaraṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana14.37:3.1.pli: Saraṇañca araṇañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nasaraṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana14.37:4.1.pli: Hetuyā pañca, ārammaṇe dve …pe… vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana14.37:5.1.pli: Saraṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naaraṇo dhammo uppajjati nahetupaccayā.

patthana14.37:6.1.pli: Araṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nanaaraṇo dhammo uppajjati nahetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana14.37:7.1.pli: Nahetuyā dve, na ārammaṇe tīṇi, naadhipatiyā pañca …pe… napurejāte cattāri …pe… nakamme dve …pe… naāhāre naindriye najhāne namagge ekaṁ …pe… navippayutte dve …pe… novigate tīṇi.

patthana14.37:8.1.pli: (Sahajātavārampi paccayavārampi nissayavārampi saṁsaṭṭhavārampi sampayuttavārampi paṭiccavārasadisaṁ vitthāretabbaṁ.)

patthana14.37:9.1.pli: Saraṇo dhammo nasaraṇassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo. Saraṇo dhammo naaraṇassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo. Saraṇo dhammo nasaraṇassa ca naaraṇassa ca dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo.

patthana14.37:10.1.pli: Araṇo dhammo nasaraṇassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo.

patthana14.37:11.1.pli: Saraṇo dhammo nasaraṇassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. Saraṇo dhammo naaraṇassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana14.37:12.1.pli: Hetuyā cattāri, ārammaṇe cattāri, adhipatiyā pañca, anantare cattāri …pe… sahajāte pañca, aññamaññe dve, nissaye satta, upanissaye cattāri, purejāte pacchājāte āsevane dve, kamme cattāri, vipāke ekaṁ, āhāre …pe… magge cattāri, sampayutte dve, vippayutte tīṇi …pe… avigate satta.

patthana14.37:13.1.pli: Saraṇo dhammo nasaraṇassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo, sahajātapaccayena paccayo, upanissayapaccayena paccayo, pacchājātapaccayena paccayo, kammapaccayena paccayo.

patthana14.37:14.1.pli: Saraṇo dhammo naaraṇassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo, sahajātapaccayena paccayo, upanissayapaccayena paccayo. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana14.37:15.1.pli: Nahetuyā satta, naārammaṇe satta, naadhipatiyā satta, naanantare satta …pe… nasahajāte pañca, naaññamaññe nanissaye pañca …pe… napurejāte cha …pe… nasampayutte pañca, navippayutte cattāri …pe… noavigate cattāri.

patthana14.4:1.1.pli: Hetuñceva sahetukañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu ceva naahetuko ca dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Hetuñceva sahetukañca dhammaṁ paṭicca naahetuko ceva nanahetu ca dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Hetuñceva sahetukañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu ceva naahetuko ca naahetuko ceva nanahetu ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana14.4:2.1.pli: Sahetukañceva na ca hetuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naahetuko ceva nanahetu ca dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Sahetukañceva na ca hetuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu ceva naahetuko ca dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Sahetukañceva na ca hetuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu ceva naahetuko ca naahetuko ceva nanahetu ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana14.4:3.1.pli: Hetuñceva sahetukañca sahetukañceva na ca hetuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu ceva naahetuko ca dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Hetuñceva sahetukañca sahetukañceva na ca hetuñca dhammaṁ paṭicca naahetuko ceva nanahetu ca dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Hetuñceva sahetukañca sahetukañceva na ca hetuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu ceva naahetuko ca naahetuko ceva nanahetu ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana14.4:4.1.pli: Hetuyā nava …pe… avigate nava. (Sahajātavārampi …pe… pañhāvārampi vitthāretabbaṁ.)

patthana14.5:1.1.pli: Hetuñceva hetusampayuttañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu ceva nahetuvippayutto ca dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Hetuñceva hetusampayuttañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetuvippayutto ceva nanahetu ca dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Hetuñceva hetusampayuttañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu ceva nahetuvippayutto ca nahetuvippayutto ceva nanahetu ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana14.5:2.1.pli: Hetusampayuttañceva na ca hetuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetuvippayutto ceva nanahetu ca dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Hetusampayuttañceva na ca hetuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu ceva nahetuvippayutto ca dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Hetusampayuttañceva na ca hetuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu ceva nahetuvippayutto ca nahetuvippayutto ceva nanahetu ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana14.5:3.1.pli: Hetuñceva hetusampayuttañca hetusampayuttañceva na ca hetuñca dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu ceva nahetuvippayutto ca dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Hetuñceva hetusampayuttañca hetusampayuttañceva na ca hetuñca dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetuvippayutto ceva nanahetu dhammo ca uppajjati hetupaccayā. Hetuñceva hetusampayuttañca hetusampayuttañceva na ca hetuñca dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu ceva nahetuvippayutto ca nahetuvippayutto ceva nanahetu ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana14.5:4.1.pli: Hetuyā nava …pe… avigate nava. (Sahajātavārampi …pe… pañhāvārampi vitthāretabbaṁ.)

patthana14.6:1.1.pli: Nahetuṁ sahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu nasahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana14.6:2.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe cattāri, adhipatiyā pañca …pe… aññamaññe cha …pe… purejāte āsevane dve …pe… avigate nava. (Sahajātavārampi …pe… pañhāvārampi vitthāretabbaṁ.)

patthana14.7:1.1.pli: Sappaccayaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naappaccayo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana14.7:3.1.pli: Sappaccayo dhammo naappaccayassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo.

patthana14.7:4.1.pli: Appaccayo dhammo naappaccayassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana14.7:5.1.pli: Hetuyā ekaṁ, ārammaṇe dve, adhipatiyā dve …pe… upanissaye dve …pe… avigate ekaṁ. (Saṅkhataṁ sappaccayasadisaṁ.)

patthana14.8:1.1.pli: Anidassanaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naanidassano dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Anidassanaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasanidassano dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Anidassanaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasanidassano ca naanidassano ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana14.8:2.1.pli: Hetuyā tīṇi, ārammaṇe ekaṁ …pe… avigate tīṇi. (Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana14.9:1.1.pli: Sappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Sappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Sappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasappaṭigho ca naappaṭigho ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana14.9:2.1.pli: Appaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Appaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Appaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasappaṭigho ca naappaṭigho ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana14.9:3.1.pli: Sappaṭighañca appaṭighañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Sappaṭighañca appaṭighañca dhammaṁ paṭicca naappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Sappaṭighañca appaṭighañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nasappaṭigho ca naappaṭigho ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana14.9:4.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe ekaṁ …pe… aññamaññe cha …pe… avigate nava. (Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana15.1:2.1.pli: Hetuṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu nakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nahetuṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nanahetu nakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Hetuṁ kusalañca nahetuṁ kusalañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu nakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi (cittasamuṭṭhānameva, ārammaṇaṁ natthi.)

patthana15.1:3.1.pli: Hetuyā tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana15.1:5.1.pli: Hetu kusalo dhammo nahetussa nakusalassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo.

patthana15.1:6.1.pli: Hetu kusalo dhammo nahetussa nakusalassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo … tīṇi.

patthana15.1:7.1.pli: Nahetu kusalo dhammo nanahetussa nakusalassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo … tīṇi.

patthana15.1:8.1.pli: Hetu kusalo ca nahetu kusalo ca dhammā nahetussa nakusalassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo … tīṇi. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana15.1:9.1.pli: Hetuyā ekaṁ, ārammaṇe nava, adhipatiyā nava, anantare samanantare nava, sahajāte nissaye tīṇi, upanissaye nava, pacchājāte tīṇi, kamme ekaṁ, āhāre ekaṁ, indriye tīṇi, jhāne ekaṁ, magge tīṇi, vippayutte tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi. (Pañhāvārampi vitthāretabbaṁ.)

patthana15.1:10.1.pli: Hetuṁ akusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu naakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana15.1:11.1.pli: Nahetuṁ akusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu naakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana15.1:12.1.pli: Hetuṁ akusalañca nahetuṁ akusalañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu naakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana15.1:14.1.pli: Hetu akusalo dhammo nahetussa naakusalassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo.

patthana15.1:15.1.pli: Hetu akusalo dhammo nahetussa naakusalassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo … tīṇi.

patthana15.1:16.1.pli: Nahetu akusalo dhammo nanahetussa naakusalassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo … tīṇi.

patthana15.1:17.1.pli: Hetu akusalo ca nahetu akusalo ca dhammā nahetussa naakusalassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo … tīṇi. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana15.1:18.1.pli: Hetuyā ekaṁ, ārammaṇe nava, adhipatiyā ekaṁ, anantare samanantare nava, sahajāte nissaye tīṇi, upanissaye nava, pacchājāte tīṇi, kamme ekaṁ, āhāre ekaṁ, indriye tīṇi, jhāne ekaṁ, magge tīṇi, vippayutte tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana15.1:19.1.pli: Nahetuṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nanahetu naabyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi. (Nissayavārampi …pe… pañhāvārampi vitthāretabbaṁ.)

patthana15.10:1.1.pli: Hetuṁ ācayagāmiṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu naācayagāmī dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …. Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana15.10:2.1.pli: Hetuṁ apacayagāmiṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu naapacayagāmī dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …. Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana15.10:3.1.pli: Nahetuṁ nevācayagāmināpacayagāmiṁ dhammaṁ paccayā nanahetu nanevācayagāmināpacayagāmī dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …. Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana15.11:1.1.pli: Hetuṁ sekkhaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu nasekkho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …. Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana15.11:2.1.pli: Hetuṁ asekkhaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu naasekkho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …. Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana15.11:3.1.pli: Nahetuṁ nevasekkhanāsekkhaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā nanahetu nanevasekkhanāsekkho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …. Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana15.12:1.1.pli: Nahetuṁ parittaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nanahetu naparitto dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …. (Sabbattha tīṇi.)

patthana15.12:2.1.pli: Hetuṁ mahaggataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu namahaggato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …. Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana15.12:3.1.pli: Hetuṁ appamāṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu naappamāṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …. Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana15.13:1.1.pli: Hetuṁ parittārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu naparittārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …. (Sabbattha tīṇi.)

patthana15.13:2.1.pli: Hetuṁ mahaggatārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu namahaggatārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …. (Sabbattha tīṇi.)

patthana15.13:3.1.pli: Hetuṁ appamāṇārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu naappamāṇārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …. Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana15.14:1.1.pli: Hetuṁ hīnaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu nahīno dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …. Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana15.14:2.1.pli: Nahetuṁ majjhimaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā nanahetu namajjhimo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …. Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana15.14:3.1.pli: Hetuṁ paṇītaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu napaṇīto dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …. Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana15.15:1.1.pli: Hetuṁ micchattaniyataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu namicchattaniyato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …. (Sabbattha tīṇi.)

patthana15.15:2.1.pli: Hetuṁ sammattaniyataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu nasammattaniyato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …. (Sabbattha tīṇi.)

patthana15.15:3.1.pli: Nahetuṁ aniyataṁ dhammaṁ paccayā nanahetu naaniyato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …. Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana15.16:1.1.pli: Hetuṁ maggārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu namaggārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …. (Sabbattha tīṇi.)

patthana15.16:2.1.pli: Hetuṁ maggahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu namaggahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …. (Sabbattha tīṇi.)

patthana15.16:3.1.pli: Hetuṁ maggādhipatiṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu namaggādhipati dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …. Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.
